solutionModules.label: Swiss Planner Apply Department
solutionModules.summary: Find, evaluate, prepare, send, and follow up funded PhD/MSc application opportunities for Iman Najafi.
solutionModules.operatingRule: Solution module -> Capability -> Recipe -> Stage -> Lane -> Quality gate -> Output.

solutionModules.label: Sample Sales Research Department
solutionModules.summary: Reusable sample department template for lead discovery, fit review, and CRM follow-up.
solutionModules.operatingRule: Department -> Capability -> Playbook -> Work Step -> Tool Lane -> QA Gate -> Output.

capabilities.label: Opportunity Discovery
capabilities.summary: Find funded PhD/MSc opportunities and verify them against official sources before promotion.

capabilities.label: Fit Assessment
capabilities.summary: Score opportunities for eligibility, funding, location, Iman's background, and private-market/project-finance relevance.

capabilities.label: Professor Research Intelligence
capabilities.summary: Build supervisor research-fit briefs from official profiles, publication evidence, and student/contact routes.

capabilities.label: Application Package Generation
capabilities.summary: Prepare tailored CV, SOP, proposal/concept note, publication list, checklist, and package folders.

capabilities.label: Outreach Email
capabilities.summary: Queue, verify, and send supervisor/admissions outreach only after content, package, and attachment gates pass.

capabilities.label: Reply And Follow-up
capabilities.summary: Sync inbound replies, reconcile application status, create follow-ups, and route supervisor decisions through Manager.

capabilities.label: CRM Sync Activation
capabilities.summary: Keep local SQLite, Google Sheet CRM, AppSheet-compatible tables, tasks, threads, and event trail synchronized.

capabilities.label: Workflow Automation
capabilities.summary: Run local and scheduled cycles until KPI targets are met or the next action is blocked by human/Codex work.

capabilities.label: AI Reasoning
capabilities.summary: Provide low-cost Manager interpretation and higher-quality Codex/AI reasoning for research, fit, and document tasks.

recipes.label: Find Verified Opportunities
recipes.summary: Search sources, verify official evidence, record leads, and hand off to Fit Analyst.

recipes.label: Convert Opportunity To Application
recipes.summary: Score opportunity, reject blockers, or create application entity and package tasks.

recipes.label: Build Professor Research Fit
recipes.summary: Gather supervisor evidence, research themes, students/contact routes, and fit notes.

recipes.label: Prepare Supervisor Package
recipes.summary: Produce package docs in the selected template, register Drive folder, and prepare package verification.

recipes.label: Safely Send Outreach
recipes.summary: Verify queue, content, package, and attachments before sending or blocking.

recipes.label: Reconcile Reply And Follow Up
recipes.summary: Sync inbound replies, match to threads, update application status, and create follow-up tasks.

recipes.label: Run CRM Health Cycle
recipes.summary: Sync local/online records, audit active entities, and raise process tasks instead of hidden warnings.

recipes.label: Run Daily KPI Cycle
recipes.summary: Run due tasks/follow-ups until KPI targets are complete or a safe blocker is reached.

recipes.label: Interpret And Route Manager Thread
recipes.summary: Use the Manager AI brain to interpret natural human messages and route work safely.

aiSupport.label: Manager low-cost reasoning
aiSupport.usage: Interpret human messages, classify intent, and route work.

aiSupport.label: Research reasoning
aiSupport.usage: Opportunity search planning, source assessment, and professor-fit synthesis.

aiSupport.label: Email safety reasoning
aiSupport.usage: Check outbound wording for unsafe internal/system language.

qualityGates.label: Official Evidence
qualityGates.rule: Serious opportunity rows require an official university/funder/institute source link.

qualityGates.label: No Duplicate Opportunity
qualityGates.rule: Do not add duplicate opportunity rows; update existing row instead.

qualityGates.label: Eligibility Check
qualityGates.rule: Reject or downgrade hard-ineligible opportunities, including graduation-date constraints.

qualityGates.label: Deadline Check
qualityGates.rule: Deadline must be active or have a clear late-application rationale.

qualityGates.label: Minimum Fit Score
qualityGates.rule: Fit Analyst must score against geography, funding, field, finance/energy relevance, and probability.

qualityGates.label: Professor Evidence
qualityGates.rule: Professor fit must cite a profile, topic, or publication source.

qualityGates.label: Source Freshness
qualityGates.rule: Current opportunity/funding/deadline facts must be verified against current sources.

qualityGates.label: Document Template Style
qualityGates.rule: Generated docs must use the agreed Harvard/academic/proposal templates, not plain placeholder formatting.

qualityGates.label: Professor Specificity
qualityGates.rule: Proposal/SOP/email must refer to the supervisor/topic/funding evidence and Iman's relevant background.

qualityGates.label: Package Folder Registered
qualityGates.rule: Each serious application has one package folder and package index under the configured Drive parent.

qualityGates.label: Content Safety
qualityGates.rule: Outbound email cannot mention internal failures, package archive problems, or system instructions.

qualityGates.label: Package Completeness
qualityGates.rule: Supervisor outreach requires CV + proposal/concept note + publication list unless explicitly fit-inquiry/no-attachment.

qualityGates.label: Attachment Access
qualityGates.rule: All attachment Drive URLs must be accessible to the Gmail bridge before sending.

qualityGates.label: Duplicate Recipient
qualityGates.rule: Repeated professor/supervisor recipients require Manager/Human review before a second send.

qualityGates.label: Reply Match Confidence
qualityGates.rule: Inbound replies must match by thread, recipient/sender domain, or application/opportunity evidence.

qualityGates.label: Follow-up Due Date
qualityGates.rule: Waiting-for-reply items need an active follow-up unless closed/cancelled/submitted.

qualityGates.label: Sync Error Check
qualityGates.rule: Sync/bridge errors become Technical Bug or System Audit tasks, not hidden logs.

qualityGates.label: Active Entity Follow-up
qualityGates.rule: Every active AI-owned entity needs an active, not-overdue follow-up or queued task.

qualityGates.label: Event Log Trace
qualityGates.rule: Important status/responsible/stage changes need an event-log or thread record.

qualityGates.label: KPI Progress
qualityGates.rule: The daily/weekly cycle continues until KPI targets are met or a blocker is explicit.

qualityGates.label: No Hidden Blocker
qualityGates.rule: When the cycle stops without work, Manager asks Human for a plan instead of silently stopping.

qualityGates.label: No Email From Chat
qualityGates.rule: Thread replies never send email by themselves.

qualityGates.label: Safe Routing
qualityGates.rule: Specialist staff talk to Manager first; only Manager talks to Human.

operatingNotes.workMap:
# Work Map

This section explains how department work moves from responsibility to execution.

## Opportunity Discovery
- Owner: `AIstaff_OpportunityHunter`
- Purpose: Find funded PhD/MSc opportunities and verify them against official sources before promotion.
- Recipes: Find Verified Opportunities
- Quality gates: Official Evidence, No Duplicate Opportunity
- Outputs: verified_opportunity_rows, evidence_links, research_leads

## Fit Assessment
- Owner: `AIstaff_FitAnalyst`
- Purpose: Score opportunities for eligibility, funding, location, Iman's background, and private-market/project-finance relevance.
- Recipes: Convert Opportunity To Application
- Quality gates: Eligibility Check, Deadline Check, Minimum Fit Score
- Outputs: fit_score, application_candidate_rows, rejection_reason

## Professor Research Intelligence
- Owner: `AIstaff_ProfessorResearchAnalyst`
- Purpose: Build supervisor research-fit briefs from official profiles, publication evidence, and student/contact routes.
- Recipes: Build Professor Research Fit
- Quality gates: Professor Evidence, Source Freshness
- Outputs: professor_fit_row, student_contact_leads, research_theme_summary

## Application Package Generation
- Owner: `AIstaff_ApplicationPackMaker`
- Purpose: Prepare tailored CV, SOP, proposal/concept note, publication list, checklist, and package folders.
- Recipes: Prepare Supervisor Package
- Quality gates: Document Template Style, Professor Specificity, Package Folder Registered
- Outputs: academic_cv, research_proposal, sop, publication_list, package_index

## Outreach Email
- Owner: `AIstaff_ApplicationPackSender`
- Purpose: Queue, verify, and send supervisor/admissions outreach only after content, package, and attachment gates pass.
- Recipes: Safely Send Outreach
- Quality gates: Content Safety, Package Completeness, Attachment Access, Duplicate Recipient
- Outputs: sent_email_log, blocked_send_reason, draft_or_manual_send_record

## Reply And Follow-up
- Owner: `AIstaff_FollowUpController`
- Purpose: Sync inbound replies, reconcile application status, create follow-ups, and route supervisor decisions through Manager.
- Recipes: Reconcile Reply And Follow Up
- Quality gates: Reply Match Confidence, Follow-up Due Date
- Outputs: reply_status_update, followup_task, thread_message

## CRM Sync Activation
- Owner: `AIstaff_CRMController`
- Purpose: Keep local SQLite, Google Sheet CRM, AppSheet-compatible tables, tasks, threads, and event trail synchronized.
- Recipes: Run CRM Health Cycle
- Quality gates: Sync Error Check, Active Entity Follow-up, Event Log Trace
- Outputs: sync_status, audit_task, manager_report

## Workflow Automation
- Owner: `AIstaff_Manager`
- Purpose: Run local and scheduled cycles until KPI targets are met or the next action is blocked by human/Codex work.
- Recipes: Run Daily KPI Cycle
- Quality gates: KPI Progress, No Hidden Blocker
- Outputs: daily_report, queued_staff_task, human_plan_request

## AI Reasoning
- Owner: `AIstaff_Manager`
- Purpose: Provide low-cost Manager interpretation and higher-quality Codex/AI reasoning for research, fit, and document tasks.
- Recipes: Interpret And Route Manager Thread
- Quality gates: No Email From Chat, Safe Routing
- Outputs: manager_reply, routed_task, skill_update_candidate

operatingNotes.qualityGates:
# Quality Gates

Use this checklist before a staff member moves work to the next stage.

## Official Evidence
- Gate ID: `gate_official_evidence`
- Rule: Serious opportunity rows require an official university/funder/institute source link.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## No Duplicate Opportunity
- Gate ID: `gate_no_duplicate_opportunity`
- Rule: Do not add duplicate opportunity rows; update existing row instead.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Eligibility Check
- Gate ID: `gate_eligibility_check`
- Rule: Reject or downgrade hard-ineligible opportunities, including graduation-date constraints.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Deadline Check
- Gate ID: `gate_deadline_check`
- Rule: Deadline must be active or have a clear late-application rationale.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Minimum Fit Score
- Gate ID: `gate_minimum_fit_score`
- Rule: Fit Analyst must score against geography, funding, field, finance/energy relevance, and probability.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Professor Evidence
- Gate ID: `gate_professor_evidence`
- Rule: Professor fit must cite a profile, topic, or publication source.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Source Freshness
- Gate ID: `gate_source_freshness`
- Rule: Current opportunity/funding/deadline facts must be verified against current sources.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Document Template Style
- Gate ID: `gate_document_template_style`
- Rule: Generated docs must use the agreed Harvard/academic/proposal templates, not plain placeholder formatting.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Professor Specificity
- Gate ID: `gate_professor_specificity`
- Rule: Proposal/SOP/email must refer to the supervisor/topic/funding evidence and Iman's relevant background.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Package Folder Registered
- Gate ID: `gate_package_folder_registered`
- Rule: Each serious application has one package folder and package index under the configured Drive parent.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Content Safety
- Gate ID: `gate_content_safety`
- Rule: Outbound email cannot mention internal failures, package archive problems, or system instructions.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Package Completeness
- Gate ID: `gate_package_completeness`
- Rule: Supervisor outreach requires CV + proposal/concept note + publication list unless explicitly fit-inquiry/no-attachment.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Attachment Access
- Gate ID: `gate_attachment_access`
- Rule: All attachment Drive URLs must be accessible to the Gmail bridge before sending.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Duplicate Recipient
- Gate ID: `gate_duplicate_recipient`
- Rule: Repeated professor/supervisor recipients require Manager/Human review before a second send.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Reply Match Confidence
- Gate ID: `gate_reply_match_confidence`
- Rule: Inbound replies must match by thread, recipient/sender domain, or application/opportunity evidence.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Follow-up Due Date
- Gate ID: `gate_followup_due_date`
- Rule: Waiting-for-reply items need an active follow-up unless closed/cancelled/submitted.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Sync Error Check
- Gate ID: `gate_sync_error_check`
- Rule: Sync/bridge errors become Technical Bug or System Audit tasks, not hidden logs.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Active Entity Follow-up
- Gate ID: `gate_active_entity_followup`
- Rule: Every active AI-owned entity needs an active, not-overdue follow-up or queued task.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Event Log Trace
- Gate ID: `gate_event_log_trace`
- Rule: Important status/responsible/stage changes need an event-log or thread record.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## KPI Progress
- Gate ID: `gate_kpi_progress`
- Rule: The daily/weekly cycle continues until KPI targets are met or a blocker is explicit.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## No Hidden Blocker
- Gate ID: `gate_no_hidden_blocker`
- Rule: When the cycle stops without work, Manager asks Human for a plan instead of silently stopping.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## No Email From Chat
- Gate ID: `gate_no_email_from_chat`
- Rule: Thread replies never send email by themselves.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.

## Safe Routing
- Gate ID: `gate_safe_routing`
- Rule: Specialist staff talk to Manager first; only Manager talks to Human.
- Severity: Blocking unless marked as advisory.
- Pass evidence: TODO
- If failed: create or update a task/thread with the blocker and next owner.
operatingNotes.dataConnectors:
# Data & Connectors

This section tells staff which systems are available and how carefully they may write to them.

## Connections
- `openai_api`: OpenAI API (Connected, AI provider)
- `codex_worker`: Codex Worker (Available, AI worker)
- `official_web_sources`: Official Web Sources (Available, web/evidence)
- `google_scholar_public_pages`: Google Scholar public pages (Available, publication evidence)
- `linkedin_lead_search`: LinkedIn Lead Search (Optional, lead source)
- `google_sheet_crm`: Swiss Planner Google Sheet CRM (Connected, database)
- `google_drive_packages`: Google Drive Package Folder (Connected, document store)
- `gmail_bridge`: Gmail Bridge (Connected, email)
- `apps_script_bridge`: Apps Script Bridge (Connected, automation)
- `local_command_center`: Windows Command Center (Connected, local runtime)

## Databases
- `db_local_sqlite`: Local SQLite task-thread store (Active, local)
- `db_opportunity`: Opportunity (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_application`: Application (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_links`: Links (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_application_docs`: Application Docs (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_application_packages`: Application Packages (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_package_files`: Package Files (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_email_send_queue`: Email Send Queue (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_outreach_queue`: Outreach Queue (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_gmail_sent_log`: Gmail Sent Log (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_gmail_inbox_log`: Gmail Inbox Log (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_professor_research_fit`: Professor Research Fit (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_student_outreach`: Student Outreach (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_ai_staff_kpis`: AI Staff KPIs (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_ai_staff_tasks`: AI Staff Tasks (Active, Google Sheet tab/local-first)
- `db_ai_staff_threads`: AI Staff Threads (Active, local-first/synced on close)
- `db_ai_staff_thread_messages`: AI Staff Thread Messages (Active, local-first/synced on close)
- `db_ai_staff_followups`: AI Staff Follow Ups (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_ai_staff_entities`: AI Staff Entities (Active, Google Sheet tab)
- `db_ai_staff_event_log`: AI Staff Event Log (Active, Google Sheet tab)

## Write Rules
- Local task/thread updates are local-first.
- Closed thread archives can sync to the online CRM.
- Email and portal actions require their own safety gates.
operatingNotes.aiBrain:
# AI Brain

This section defines which reasoning level is used for each kind of work.

## Manager low-cost reasoning
- AI ID: `ai_manager_low_cost`
- Model: gpt-5-mini
- Reasoning effort: minimal
- Owner: `AIstaff_Manager`
- Usage: Interpret human messages, classify intent, and route work.
- Cost policy: Use the lowest level that can safely complete the work.

## Fit reasoning
- AI ID: `ai_fit_reasoning`
- Model: gpt-5-mini
- Reasoning effort: low
- Owner: `AIstaff_FitAnalyst`
- Usage: Eligibility, fit scoring, and prioritization.
- Cost policy: Use the lowest level that can safely complete the work.

## Research reasoning
- AI ID: `ai_research_reasoning`
- Model: gpt-5-mini or Codex
- Reasoning effort: medium
- Owner: `AIstaff_OpportunityHunter`
- Usage: Opportunity search planning, source assessment, and professor-fit synthesis.
- Cost policy: Use the lowest level that can safely complete the work.

## Document writing
- AI ID: `ai_document_writing_high_quality`
- Model: Codex / higher reasoning when needed
- Reasoning effort: high
- Owner: `AIstaff_ApplicationPackMaker`
- Usage: CV/SOP/proposal quality and professor-specific framing.
- Cost policy: Use the lowest level that can safely complete the work.

## Email safety reasoning
- AI ID: `ai_email_safety_reasoning`
- Model: gpt-5-mini
- Reasoning effort: minimal
- Owner: `AIstaff_ApplicationPackSender`
- Usage: Check outbound wording for unsafe internal/system language.
- Cost policy: Use the lowest level that can safely complete the work.
operatingNotes.outputTemplates:

## Opportunity Discovery
- Owner: `AIstaff_OpportunityHunter`
- Outputs: verified_opportunity_rows, evidence_links, research_leads
- Naming rule: include application/opportunity ID when available.
- Evidence rule: attach a link, file path, or task/thread reference.

## Fit Assessment

operatingNotes.learningLibrary:
# Learning Library

Closed threads can become Skill Update Candidates.

## Rule
- Human-approved learnings are appended to the related staff role file.
- Do not auto-apply a learning without `Human_Iman` approval.
- The Manager decides whether a human answer should become a department rule or a staff-specific rule.

## Where Learnings Go
- Department-wide rule: `swiss-planner-staff/SKILL.md`
- Staff-specific rule: `swiss-planner-staff/roles/<StaffID>.md`

departmentTemplates.label: Swiss Planner Application Department
departmentTemplates.purpose: Find, evaluate, prepare, send, and follow up funded PhD/MSc applications.

departmentTemplates.label: Sample Sales Research Department
departmentTemplates.purpose: Sample reusable department template proving the platform is not Swiss Planner-only.

staffProfiles.label: Iman / Human
staffProfiles.contactPolicy: Human gives instructions only to AI Manager.

staffProfiles.label: AI Manager
staffProfiles.contactPolicy: Only AI Manager communicates directly with the human manager.

outputTemplates.label: Application Package
outputTemplates.storage: Drive package folder and Application Packages / Package Files rows

outputTemplates.storage: Email Send Queue and task/thread evidence

outputTemplates.label: Manager Operating Report
outputTemplates.storage: Reports page and AI Staff Reports

kpis.label: Follow-up Compliance
kpis.minimumEvidenceLevel: No active AI-owned entity without due follow-up

reportDefinitions.label: Manager Operating Report
reportDefinitions.purpose: Explain what is happening, why it matters, and the next action.

reportDefinitions.label: Department Health
reportDefinitions.purpose: Show sync health, stale work, blockers, and backup/version state.

lockedPlatformRules: Thread replies never send email by themselves.
Only AI Manager creates human-facing tasks.
External sends require queue approval, content safety, package completeness, and attachment verification.
workspaceEditableRules: Tool assignments and non-locked QA gates
governance.versioning: Every designer save writes a Department Version row.
governance.backupPolicy: Create a local backup before major config changes.
governance.learningPolicy: Approved human learning is added only after explicit approval.
